stories.title: Cubs 5, Orioles 2 — Game Recap (July 7)
stories.angle: Boyd delivers solid start (game score 61); Cubs win fourth straight; Swanson on a tear (.9-for-22 last 6 games); Cubs now 51-40, 7-3 in last 10

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs 5, Orioles 2. ✅

Boyd delivered a quality start (game score 61) and the offense did enough. Swanson has been locked in — 9 for his last 22 entering this series.

Cubs: 51-40. Seven wins in their last ten. Baltimore never had a chance. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Cubs Rolling — 16-6 Since June 10 (Best in MLB)
stories.angle: The Cubs have been the best team in baseball since June 10 with a 16-6 record. This isn't a hot streak — it's a championship team finding its gear.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Since June 10, the Cubs are 16-6 — one of the best stretches in baseball.

They've done it missing five starters at once: Horton, Steele, Cabrera, Brown, and Taillon.

51-40. No. 2 NL Wild Card. And the rotation isn't even healthy yet. 🔥

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Wild Card Watch — Cardinals Losing Ground
stories.angle: Cubs (51-40) hold No. 2 NL Wild Card; Cardinals (47-43) lost again last night (4-3 to Brewers). The Cards are fading. Stat-backed standing context.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Wild card update, July 8:

Cubs: 51-40. No. 2 NL Wild Card. 🔵
Cardinals: lost again last night (to the Brewers), slipping further outside the picture.

Cubs have built a 4-game cushion in the wild card race while St. Louis tries to figure it out.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Trade Deadline — 26 Days, Joe Ryan Is the Target
stories.angle: Trade deadline is August 3 (26 days). Joe Ryan (3.36 ERA, 2.82 FIP) is the leading target. Cubs need rotation depth — five starters remain on the IL. Ryan has one more year of control after 2026.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The MLB Trade Deadline is August 3 — 26 days away.

Joe Ryan (Twins): 3.36 ERA, 2.82 FIP, 104 IP. Not a rental — he's under control through 2027.

The Cubs have five starters on the IL. Ryan is the rotation anchor they need. Time to make a move. 📞

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.angle: Colin Rea (6-5, 4.74 ERA) vs Dean Kremer (1-1, 3.18 ERA); 5:35 PM CT; Cubs a chance to extend win streak; Orioles 11.5 games back and reeling

Game 2 in Baltimore tonight — 5:35 PM CT on Marquee. 📺

Colin Rea (6-5, 4.74 ERA) for the Cubs vs Dean Kremer (3.18 ERA, back from a quad strain) for Baltimore.

Orioles are 42-50. Cubs are 51-40 and rolling. Let's take this series. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Injury Roundup — Taillon Confirmed Post-ASB, Roberts on IL
stories.angle: Taillon (hamstring) now confirmed returning AFTER All-Star break (second rehab start incoming). Wyatt Roberts placed on 15-day IL (forearm). Milner out 4-6 weeks (appendectomy). Antoine Kelly callup watch with roster opening.

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Cubs injury roundup:

Taillon (hamstring) rehab start done (3.1 IP, 1 ER) — returning AFTER the All-Star break. Wyatt Roberts on 15-day IL (forearm).

That opens a bullpen spot for Antoine Kelly (0.71 ERA, Iowa), if the Cubs want it. 👀

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Antoine Kelly — Iowa Cubs Lefty Worth Watching
stories.angle: Antoine Kelly (acquired from Dodgers) has been elite at Iowa — 0.71 ERA, fastball approaching 100 MPH. With Roberts on IL, his number could be called. Owen Ayers also raking at Double-A (21 HRs).

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Antoine Kelly (Cubs, Iowa): sub-1.00 ERA in 13+ IP, fastball approaching 100 mph, 27% K rate.

Wyatt Roberts just landed on the 15-day IL (forearm). The roster spot is open.

At Double-A, Owen Ayers (21 HRs) is still raking. The farm is alive. 💪

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
